budgets.title: Get all budgets for an organization

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: The organization name. The name is not case sensitive.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number of the results to fetch.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: The number of results per page (max 10).

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Filter budgets by scope type.

budgets.descriptionHTML:
Note

This endpoint is in public preview and is subject to change.

Gets all budgets for an organization. The authenticated user must be an organization admin or billing manager. Each page returns up to 10 budgets.

id.description: The unique identifier for the budget

budget_type.description: The type of pricing for the budget

budget_amount.description: The budget amount limit in whole dollars. For license-based products, this represents the number of licenses.

prevent_further_usage.description: The type of limit enforcement for the budget

budget_scope.description: The scope of the budget (enterprise, organization, repository, cost center)

budget_entity_name.description: The name of the entity for the budget (enterprise does not require a name).

budget_product_sku.description: A single product or sku to apply the budget to.

will_alert.description: Whether alerts are enabled for this budget

alert_recipients.description: Array of user login names who will receive alerts

budgets.description: Array of budget objects for the enterprise

has_next_page.description: Indicates if there are more pages of results available (maps to hasNextPage from billing platform)

total_count.description: Total number of budgets matching the query

budgets.title: Get a budget by ID for an organization

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: The organization name. The name is not case sensitive.

parameters.name: budget_id
parameters.description: The ID corresponding to the budget.

budgets.descriptionHTML:
Note

This endpoint is in public preview and is subject to change.

Gets a budget by ID. The authenticated user must be an organization admin or billing manager.

budget_scope.description: The type of scope for the budget

budget_entity_name.description: The name of the entity to apply the budget to

budget_amount.description: The budget amount in whole dollars. For license-based products, this represents the number of licenses.

prevent_further_usage.description: Whether to prevent additional spending once the budget is exceeded

budget_product_sku.description: A single product or sku to apply the budget to.

budget_type.description: The type of pricing for the budget

will_alert.description: Whether alerts are enabled for this budget

alert_recipients.description: Array of user login names who will receive alerts

budgets.title: Update a budget for an organization

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: The organization name. The name is not case sensitive.

parameters.name: budget_id
parameters.description: The ID corresponding to the budget.

bodyParameters.name: budget_amount
bodyParameters.description: The budget amount in whole dollars. For license-based products, this represents the number of licenses.

bodyParameters.name: prevent_further_usage
bodyParameters.description: Whether to prevent additional spending once the budget is exceeded

childParamsGroups.name: will_alert
childParamsGroups.description: Whether alerts are enabled for this budget

childParamsGroups.name: alert_recipients
childParamsGroups.description: Array of user login names who will receive alerts

bodyParameters.name: budget_entity_name
bodyParameters.description: The name of the entity to apply the budget to

bodyParameters.name: budget_type
bodyParameters.description: The type of pricing for the budget

bodyParameters.name: budget_product_sku
bodyParameters.description: A single product or SKU that will be covered in the budget

budgets.descriptionHTML:
Note

This endpoint is in public preview and is subject to change.

Updates an existing budget for an organization. The authenticated user must be an organization admin or billing manager.

budget_amount.description: The budget amount in whole dollars. For license-based products, this represents the number of licenses.

prevent_further_usage.description: Whether to prevent additional spending once the budget is exceeded

will_alert.description: Whether alerts are enabled for this budget

alert_recipients.description: Array of user login names who will receive alerts

budget_entity_name.description: The name of the entity to apply the budget to

budget_type.description: The type of pricing for the budget

budget_product_sku.description: A single product or SKU that will be covered in the budget

statusCodes.description: Budget not found or feature not enabled
Validation failed, or the endpoint has been spammed.

budgets.title: Delete a budget for an organization

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: The organization name. The name is not case sensitive.

parameters.name: budget_id
parameters.description: The ID corresponding to the budget.

budgets.descriptionHTML:
Note

This endpoint is in public preview and is subject to change.

Deletes a budget by ID for an organization. The authenticated user must be an organization admin or billing manager.

message.description: A message indicating the result of the deletion operation

id.description: The ID of the deleted budget

usage.title: Get billing premium request usage report for an organization

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: The organization name. The name is not case sensitive.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: If specified, only return results for a single year. The value of year is an integer with four digits representing a year. For example, 2025. Default value is the current year.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: If specified, only return results for a single month. The value of month is an integer between 1 and 12. Default value is the current month. If no year is specified the default year is used.

parameters.name: day
parameters.description: If specified, only return results for a single day. The value of day is an integer between 1 and 31. If no year or month is specified, the default year and month are used.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user name to query usage for. The name is not case sensitive.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The model name to query usage for. The name is not case sensitive.

parameters.name: product
parameters.description: The product name to query usage for. The name is not case sensitive.

usage.descriptionHTML:
Gets a report of premium request usage for an organization. To use this endpoint, you must be an administrator of an organization within an enterprise or an organization account.

Note: Only data from the past 24 months is accessible via this endpoint.

response.description: Response when getting a billing premium request usage report

year.description: The year for the usage report.

month.description: The month for the usage report.

day.description: The day for the usage report.

organization.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

user.description: The name of the user for the usage report.

product.description: The product for the usage report.

model.description: The model for the usage report.

unitType.description: Unit type of the usage line item.

pricePerUnit.description: Price per unit of the usage line item.

grossQuantity.description: Gross quantity of the usage line item.

grossAmount.description: Gross amount of the usage line item.

discountQuantity.description: Discount quantity of the usage line item.

discountAmount.description: Discount amount of the usage line item.

netQuantity.description: Net quantity of the usage line item.

netAmount.description: Net amount of the usage line item.

statusCodes.description: Response when getting a billing premium request usage report

usage.title: Get billing usage report for an organization

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: The organization name. The name is not case sensitive.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: If specified, only return results for a single year. The value of year is an integer with four digits representing a year. For example, 2025. Default value is the current year.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: If specified, only return results for a single month. The value of month is an integer between 1 and 12. If no year is specified the default year is used.

parameters.name: day
parameters.description: If specified, only return results for a single day. The value of day is an integer between 1 and 31. If no year or month is specified, the default year and month are used.

usage.descriptionHTML:
Gets a report of the total usage for an organization. To use this endpoint, you must be an administrator of an organization within an enterprise or an organization account.

Note: This endpoint is only available to organizations with access to the enhanced billing platform. For more information, see "About the enhanced billing platform."

response.description: Billing usage report response for an organization

date.description: Date of the usage line item.

quantity.description: Quantity of the usage line item.

unitType.description: Unit type of the usage line item.

pricePerUnit.description: Price per unit of the usage line item.

grossAmount.description: Gross amount of the usage line item.

discountAmount.description: Discount amount of the usage line item.

netAmount.description: Net amount of the usage line item.

statusCodes.description: Billing usage report response for an organization

usage.title: Get billing usage summary for an organization

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: The organization name. The name is not case sensitive.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: If specified, only return results for a single year. The value of year is an integer with four digits representing a year. For example, 2025. Default value is the current year.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: If specified, only return results for a single month. The value of month is an integer between 1 and 12. Default value is the current month. If no year is specified the default year is used.

parameters.name: day
parameters.description: If specified, only return results for a single day. The value of day is an integer between 1 and 31. If no year or month is specified, the default year and month are used.

parameters.name: repository
parameters.description: The repository name to query for usage in the format owner/repository.

parameters.name: product
parameters.description: The product name to query usage for. The name is not case sensitive.

parameters.name: sku
parameters.description: The SKU to query for usage.

usage.descriptionHTML:
Note

This endpoint is in public preview and is subject to change.

Gets a summary report of usage for an organization. To use this endpoint, you must be an administrator of an organization within an enterprise or an organization account.

Note: Only data from the past 24 months is accessible via this endpoint.

response.description: Response when getting a billing usage summary

year.description: The year for the usage report.

month.description: The month for the usage report.

day.description: The day for the usage report.

organization.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

repository.description: The name of the repository for the usage report.

product.description: The product for the usage report.

sku.description: The SKU for the usage report.

unitType.description: Unit type of the usage line item.

pricePerUnit.description: Price per unit of the usage line item.

grossQuantity.description: Gross quantity of the usage line item.

grossAmount.description: Gross amount of the usage line item.

discountQuantity.description: Discount quantity of the usage line item.

discountAmount.description: Discount amount of the usage line item.

netQuantity.description: Net quantity of the usage line item.

netAmount.description: Net amount of the usage line item.

statusCodes.description: Response when getting a billing usage summary

parameters.name: day
parameters.description: If specified, only return results for a single day. The value of day is an integer between 1 and 31. If no year or month is specified, the default year and month are used.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The model name to query usage for. The name is not case sensitive.

parameters.name: product
parameters.description: The product name to query usage for. The name is not case sensitive.

usage.descriptionHTML:
Gets a report of premium request usage for a user.

Note: Only data from the past 24 months is accessible via this endpoint.

response.description: Response when getting a billing premium request usage report

year.description: The year for the usage report.

month.description: The month for the usage report.

day.description: The day for the usage report.

user.description: The unique identifier of the user.

product.description: The product for the usage report.

model.description: The model for the usage report.

unitType.description: Unit type of the usage line item.

pricePerUnit.description: Price per unit of the usage line item.

grossAmount.description: Gross amount of the usage line item.

discountQuantity.description: Discount quantity of the usage line item.

discountAmount.description: Discount amount of the usage line item.

netQuantity.description: Net quantity of the usage line item.

netAmount.description: Net amount of the usage line item.

statusCodes.description: Response when getting a billing premium request usage report
